race.comment: AUDREY'S LANE (2) consistent mare adept in all conditions. Shouldered the 58.5kg with a tough on-pace third over 1500m at Hawkesbury in this class. At her top now and will prove hard to get past from the good gate. BELLA KHADIJAH (6) rewarded for her consistency with the weight drop when she swooped late to score over 1500m at Hawkesbury. Up slightly in weight from the low draw and will relish the sting out of the ground. Go close again. CONGRESSMAN (14) lightly raced gelding yet to be tested on a rain affected track. Sat on the fast tempo with the 57.5kg for a close-up fourth over 1300m at Warwick Farm. Has a tricky gate to navigate here and not to be overlooked. FLYING EMBERS (1) deep into the prep and will find this more to her liking fifth-up. Had no luck at Eagle Farm over 1400m in BM85 grade. Has a good record over this track and trip and sure to be thereabouts. PENPEL (15) improving filly who indicated a win was imminent. Winkers go on and keep safe.
